name: Time Machine Game
description:
Want to fuck Cleopatra or Joan of Arc? Want to hang out with Muhammad or Jesus? Want to send the Austrian guy with the Charlie Chaplin mustache or the Georgian guy with the Mario Bros. mustache to hell? With this machine, anything goes!

You can choose any time in history, and the AI will make it vividly real for you, depicting the historical characters with the same accuracy.
creator: VICTOR_
